title: vatica griffithii
intro: Vatica griffithii, also known as the Borneo ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to Borneo and Sumatra. The bark and leaves of this tree have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vatica griffithii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Vatica griffithii is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or topical applications, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
